field_values.action_summary: The protagonist engages in intensive combat training in the plaza against a Martian youth, utilizing his knowledge of Earthly fighting techniques to bridge the gap in raw strength.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide shots of plaza training; Dynamic medium shots of combat exchanges; Close-ups of footwork and weapon contact
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Weapon positions must remain consistent between beats
Sweat and dirt accumulation on protagonist
Lighting consistency for time of day
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH009_SC002

## Production Intent
The protagonist utilizes Earthly martial techniques to overcome the raw physical strength advantage of a Martian youth during intensive combat training.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- martian_youth

## Required Environments
- plaza_training_grounds

## Continuity Constraints
- Weapon positions must remain consistent between beats
- Sweat and dirt accumulation on protagonist
- Lighting consistency for time of day

## Beat List
- BT001: Initial engagement and circling
- BT002: Strength vs. Technique struggle
- BT003: Technical mastery demonstration
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
